notes.note: AI controls: Keep Firefox AI features on your terms with one place to turn them on, off or customize them individually.
Page summaries: Cut through long articles with quick, readable summaries available with a tap or shake. Now available in English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian and Japanese.
Fixed issues with the language picker, customization sheet and search bar.

system_requirements:
## Operating systems
 - iOS 15
 - iOS 16
 - iOS 17
 - iOS 18
 - iOS 26
text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you at [iOS Support][1].


  [1]: https://mzl.la/iOSSupport
title: Firefox for iOS 151.0 Release
